composition_notes: Player positioned left-of-center on riverbank, facing right toward cave entrance and boats (into frame). Tools arranged in descending diagonal on right side: ticket (top-right, escape option), camera (mid-right, investigation), torch (lower-right, cave exploration). Layout creates visual tension between player's position and the three decision paths.
rationale: Mission M12 presents a critical chase decision at cave entrance. Player stands on shore contemplating three paths: board departing boat (ticket), investigate with light (camera/torch), or enter dark cave (torch). Right-side tool cluster balances the left-positioned player, creating compositional tension that mirrors the narrative urgency. Diagonal tool arrangement guides eye from quick escape (top) to dangerous exploration (bottom), matching point values 1→2→3.
